text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a few days before the Mainichi Hai, but with
the Satsuki Sho on the horizon, talks naturally
turn to that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is a clash of greats. Racers to
look out for include... There's no mention of me
anywhere.
choice_data_list:
Are you curious about what people think of
you?

Are you curious about what people think of
you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not particularly. I'm sure opinions will change
after the Mainichi Hai at any rate.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Rather, I must make them change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than be discouraged by the lack of
recognition, Yaeno Muteki seems to have been
motivated to do better instead. I can't help but
admire that about her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think I should be most wary of in the
Mainichi Hai?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is one of Yaeno Muteki's classmates,
hailing from Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her talent has already garnered much attention,
earning her a reputation as a skilled racer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the public thinks very highly of Oguri,
and I can tell she possesses great prowess just
from watching her train.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh... The mightier the foe I face, the more
excited I become.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I shall subdue her! Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Mainichi Hai...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's Oguri Cap. They say she's got a real
shot at winning even graded races!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan
text_block_list.text: Oguri! I came from Kasamatsu to cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you so much. That means a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Oguri seems the same as always. I don't sense
any kind of overwhelming threat from her...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Her actual presence is at complete odds with her
reputation and strength. Be that as it may, I have
no intention of letting my guard down.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
All I must focus on is controlling the blaze fierce
with water still.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall win this race and then make a name for
myself at the Satsuki Sho!
